languages.text: Номос покинули борт корабля фон Валанциус, отправившись в ледяные руки своего нового хозяина. Их краткая жизнь была зациклена в вечной петле и выставлена на обозрение среди бесчисленных экспозиций таинственного Музеона, ставшего гробницей для множества других уникальных чудес вселенной.

Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.
languages.original_text: Номос покинули борт корабля фон Валанциус, отправившись в ледяные руки своего нового хозяина. Их краткая жизнь была зациклена в вечной петле и выставлена на обозрение среди бесчисленных экспозиций таинственного Музеона, ставшего гробницей для множества других уникальных чудес вселенной.

traits.locale_text: Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.

Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.

Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.

languages.text: ノモスは、ヴァランシウス家の旗艦を離れ、新たな主の氷の手に引き渡された。その短い生涯は、永遠のループに囚われ、謎の美術館「ミュゼイオン」の無数の展示物の中に、宇宙の他のユニークな奇蹟と共に埋葬された。
languages.original_text: Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.

traits.locale_text: ノモスは、ヴァランシウス家の旗艦を離れ、新たな主の氷の手に引き渡された。その短い生涯は、永遠のループに囚われ、謎の美術館「ミュゼイオン」の無数の展示物の中に、宇宙の他のユニークな奇蹟と共に埋葬された。

languages.text: 诺莫斯离开了冯·瓦兰修斯的旗舰，投入了新主人冰冷的掌心。他们短暂的生命被困在永恒的循环里，成了神秘陈列馆展出的无数藏品之一。这座陈列馆早已是众多宇宙奇珍的墓穴。
languages.original_text: Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.

traits.locale_text: 诺莫斯离开了冯·瓦兰修斯的旗舰，投入了新主人冰冷的掌心。他们短暂的生命被困在永恒的循环里，成了神秘陈列馆展出的无数藏品之一。这座陈列馆早已是众多宇宙奇珍的墓穴。

languages.text: Nomos quitta le vaisseau amiral de la maison von Valancius pour rejoindre les mains glacées de son nouveau maître. Sa courte vie fut piégée dans une éternelle boucle temporelle et exhibée aux côtés des autres pièces de collection du mystérieux Muséion, qui était devenu le tombeau de nombreuses merveilles uniques de l'univers.
languages.original_text: Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.

traits.locale_text: Nomos quitta le vaisseau amiral de la maison von Valancius pour rejoindre les mains glacées de son nouveau maître. Sa courte vie fut piégée dans une éternelle boucle temporelle et exhibée aux côtés des autres pièces de collection du mystérieux Muséion, qui était devenu le tombeau de nombreuses merveilles uniques de l'univers.

languages.text: Nomos abandonó la nave insignia von para pasar a las manos gélidas de su nuevo amo. Su breve vida quedó atrapada en un bucle eterno y se exhibió junto con la infinidad de obras del misterioso Museion, la tumba de muchas de las maravillas únicas del universo.
languages.original_text: Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.

traits.locale_text: Nomos abandonó la nave insignia von para pasar a las manos gélidas de su nuevo amo. Su breve vida quedó atrapada en un bucle eterno y se exhibió junto con la infinidad de obras del misterioso Museion, la tumba de muchas de las maravillas únicas del universo.

languages.text: Nomos, yeni ustalarının buz gibi ellerine teslim edilmek üzere von Valancius sancak gemisinden ayrıldı. Kısa hayatı sonsuz bir döngüye hapsoldu ve evrenin diğer pek çok eşsiz harikası için mezara dönüşen gizemli Museion'un sayısız diğer sergileri arasında yerini aldı.
languages.original_text: Nomos left the von Valancius flagship, bound for the icy hands of their new master. Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.

traits.locale_text: Nomos, yeni ustalarının buz gibi ellerine teslim edilmek üzere von Valancius sancak gemisinden ayrıldı. Kısa hayatı sonsuz bir döngüye hapsoldu ve evrenin diğer pek çok eşsiz harikası için mezara dönüşen gizemli Museion'un sayısız diğer sergileri arasında yerini aldı.

languages.text: Nomos verließ das Flaggschiff derer von Valancius, um sich in die eisigen Hände seines neuen Meisters zu begeben. Sein kurzes Leben war in einer ewigen Schleife gefangen und neben zahllosen anderen Exponaten des mysteriösen Museions ausgestellt, das zu einem Grab für viele andere einzigartige Wunder des Universums geworden war.

Their brief life was caught in an eternal loop and put on display among the countless other exhibits of the mysterious Museion, which had become a tomb for many other unique wonders of the universe.

Sein kurzes Leben war in einer ewigen Schleife gefangen und neben zahllosen anderen Exponaten des mysteriösen Museions ausgestellt, das zu einem Grab für viele andere einzigartige Wunder des Universums geworden war.
